chat.speaker: Milo
chat.text: Hey, I found a cracked app that gives free gems. Hurry, link expires soon.

chat.speaker: You
chat.text: It sounds sketchy. What if it steals my account?

choices.label: Decline and report the link
choices.debrief: Great call. Suspicious links are a common path for account theft.

quiz.question: What is the safest next step after receiving a suspicious link?
options: Report it and avoid opening it

choices.label: Try the link to see if it works
choices.debrief: Risky choice. Malware and phishing pages often pretend to be rewards.

quiz.question: What is a common goal of phishing links?

chat.speaker: Rae
chat.text: Post your recovery email here right now so we can verify your guild rank.

chat.speaker: You
chat.text: That feels private. Is there another way?

choices.label: Keep personal info private and ask a moderator
choices.debrief: Exactly. Personal account details should never be shared in public chat.

choices.label: Share details quickly to keep rank
choices.debrief: Not safe. Pressure tactics are used to trick players into oversharing.

quiz.question: What is a warning sign of social engineering?

chat.speaker: StreamerBot
chat.text: Congrats! Claim your reward in 5 minutes by entering your password at this mirror site.

chat.speaker: You
chat.text: Real giveaways shouldn't need my password...

choices.label: Verify on the official site before acting
choices.debrief: Smart. Always confirm giveaways through trusted official channels.

quiz.question: Why should you avoid mirror login pages?

choices.label: Enter password to claim quickly
choices.debrief: Unsafe. Never provide your password outside the official login flow.

quiz.question: Where should you enter your game password?
